name: Bonnie Budgie Bird Food 500g
description: Bonnie Budgie food is a mixture of specially selected grains and seeds loved by budgerigars. The wide variety of ingredients ensures that birds get all the required nutrients. INGREDIENTS: Yellow Millet, White Millet, Red Millet, Niger Seed, Canary Seed. FEEDING RECOMMENDATION: Per each bird about 10 gr (1 tablespoon) daily. Budgerigars eat during most of the time they are awake and should therefore have free access to the fresh feed in a clean bowl. Empty seed coats should be cleaned from the feeding bowl every day. Remember to ensure that birds have free access to the feed and fresh drinking water.
